deals.title: 8449 Coughran Rd
deals.notes: Cash transaction $152,000. Lien release obtained Apr 21. Cleared and funded Apr 26, closed Apr 27, 2026.
deals.next: Post-close: gift delivery, thank you notes to Chelsey and Michael, follow-up with Joyce

logs.m: Officially closed and funded. Transaction complete.
Lien release signed by Fernando Castillo at mobile notary. Delivered to Chicago Title.
Contacted lien holder Fabian Cerrillo. Understanding and willing to work with us.

deals.title: Tilden 20ac Land Sale
deals.notes: 20 acres hunting property. Price reduced to $117,500. Clearing complete. Exclusions: Conex contents, camper trailer, feeders. Current offer dead.
deals.next: Follow up with Steve as clearing wraps. Lead with net after close on next offer.

logs.m: Amendment signed. Price adjusted to $117,500. Agent outreach in progress.
Clearing complete. Photos posted to social. Drone footage needed for marketing.
Current offer dead. Michael Rodriguez financing stalled, option money not received.

deals.title: 181 CR 7751 Devine
deals.notes: Bank-owned REO. Renovation in progress with Matt Toney/San Antonio Remodelers. Work on track. Utilities being coordinated. Ready to list soon.
deals.next: Get transformer number on-site. Get updated payoff letter. Send listing agreement to Jerry Sadler and Ray Stidham.

logs.m: Cleanup active. Floor demo complete, drywall cut for electrician and plumber. Utilities confirmed.
Work officially starting with dumpsters.
Matt Toney connected directly with Jerry Sadler. Work to start by Monday.

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr Devine
deals.notes: Underwater by $93K-$143K. VA loan balance $489,501. Monthly PITI $3,500. Vacant 6 months. Carrying costs mounting. Three path options identified: short sale, VA assumption, or bring cash to close.
deals.next: Call broker first. Then call Matt and Chandler with three options. Recommend Path C or A.

logs.m: Where Things Stand email sent. Three options laid out. Option 3 highlighted at $518,999.
Stopped by property. Landscaper to cut yard. Need showing feedback from May 5.
Express Offers returned $550K value. Likely off given CMA and market.

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path San Antonio
deals.notes: Referral from Isaac Linares. Motivated seller relocating NC. June deadline. Hairline foundation crack flagged. First showing feedback received. Roof insurance claim moving forward.
deals.next: Monitor for second showing or offer. Confirm roof and fascia decision with insurance adjuster.

logs.m: First showing feedback received. Cultural concern about street direction. Roof decision pending.
Insurance adjuster out May 11. Claim moving forward. MLS launch back on track.
Listing agreement signed. Photos in from ATG. Going live May 13.

deals.title: 00 Borregas Elmendorf
deals.notes: Land development opportunity. Sisters want to end listing. Isaac development interest at $150K for mobile home project. Title defect confirmed and being corrected.
deals.next: Follow up with sisters on listing extension. Connect Isaac with Josh LT for partnership discussion. Get attorney fee estimate from Van Hutchins.

logs.m: Price adjustment needed. Isaac developing 10-acre lot concept with mobile homes. Josh LT potential partner.
Title defect confirmed: incomplete legal description. Van Hutchins preparing correction deed.
Sisters enthusiastic about Isaac development angle. Mobile home concept for displaced veterans.

deals.title: Colton Brown 485 W FM 462
deals.notes: Divorce sale. Payoff $255,578 as of Feb 2026. Thin market with 3 comps in 10 miles. CMA range $275K-$315K. Recommend $295K starting price.
deals.next: Get updated payoff letter from lender. Schedule professional photos. Get listing agreement signed.

logs.m: Met at property. Payoff confirmed $255,578. CMA pulled. Net sheet built.
Prior clients. Divorce situation. Need to list to finish renovation.

deals.title: Mike & Alice Howell Buyer
deals.notes: Rental being sold, need to move fast. Pivoting to new construction. No HOA requirement firm. Lenders: Zach Schaphorst (MTG Broker), Erik Williams (Success Lending).
deals.next: Confirm pre-approval with Zach. Set up new construction home search. Identify builders with no HOA.

logs.m: Sent showingnew.com platform. Rental being sold, rents going up. Pivoting to new construction.
916 Marriott assessed and passed. Foundation issues, 2011 roof. New construction idea accepted.
Connected with Zach Schaphorst. Debt paid off. 30-day wait for credit. Pre-approval target Feb 2026.

deals.title: 3504 Painted Riv Schertz
deals.notes: Investor flip. Purchase $199K, rehab $65K, ARV $340K, projected profit $42K-$62K. CMA pulled 31 comps. Building branded analysis template.
deals.next: Pull MLS comps and RPR report. Feed to Sirhc. Build first analysis sheet template.

logs.m: Investor sent deal. Building property analysis tool and branded template.

deals.title: Moran New Construction
deals.notes: Buyer rep signed May 7. Budget $50K down, target $1,000/month payment. Not locked to builder. Rate buydowns are the leverage. Rental contact James Jimbo Stringer at 8527 Green Bliss.
deals.next: Follow up with Milagros on signature status. Pull new construction inventory. Identify no-HOA options.

logs.m: MI Homes option from Frank. Need to confirm if Milagros reviewed. Follow up with Brandon.
Intro email sent to Milagros. Buyer rep signature packet sent via Skyslope.
Buyer rep signed.

deals.title: 8527 Green Bliss Rental
deals.notes: Rental at Grace Gardens. New Lennar home 2025. Jimbo ready to move forward. Rent $1,595/month. Lease 12 months. Commission full co-op 50/50. All questions answered May 14.
deals.next: Finalize listing agreement in Skyslope. Get Jimbo signature. Order vinyl signs. List property.

logs.m: All questions answered by Jimbo. Listing agreement ready to finalize. Vinyl signs needed.
Spoke to Jimbo on road to Devine. Ready to move forward.

leads.title: Sallie Mae F.
leads.detail: Garden community connection. Grief to healing through plants story. Content collaboration potential with permission.
leads.next: Follow up personally. Ask permission for story. Keep nurturing relationship.

leads.next: Full Sage intake call. Understand buy box, budget, timeline, strategy.

leads.detail: 13810 Tangle Tree St. Property 90% complete. Working with another realtor. Open to selling as-is. Pre-market opportunity.
leads.next: Follow up on finishing work progress. Offer to promote to network. Stay relational.

leads.detail: Property behind Miss Pat. Deceased owner was avid gardener. Son now owns. Probate potential.
leads.next: Get son details from Miss Pat. Reach out as neighbor first. Assess if selling.

leads.title: Bryce - VA Buyer
leads.detail: Dumpster contractor at 181 CR 7751. Wife active military VA eligible. Recently moved from Ohio, renting. Looking to buy home in San Antonio.
leads.next: Get Bryce contact info. Qualify wife VA eligibility. Send VA Buyers Guide.

leads.title: Jerome - Fixer Property Buyer
leads.detail: Jerome Gardner downline agent Schertz/Cibolo. Has buyer interested in property needing work. Unique situation.
leads.next: Follow up with Jerome. Get full details on buyer and property. Understand scope.

leads.title: Brandon Moran
leads.detail: Long-standing relationship. Green Bliss rental listing (uncle Jimbo). Mom Milagros new construction buyer ($50K down, $1K/mo target). Grace Gardens community opportunity.
leads.next: Confirm rental listing timeline. Coordinate mom visit to model homes. Register as buyer agent on first visit.

leads.title: Kurt - Neighbor Prospect
leads.detail: Neighbor around Conbes area. Interested in nearby 9815 Conbes listing. Wants intel on offers. Possible seller or buyer.
leads.next: Pull CMA for Kurt's area. Follow up with listing agent on 9815 Conbes. Determine needs.
